name: Bratislava Danube Cycling (EuroVelo 6 & 13)
description: Two major EuroVelo cycling routes pass through Bratislava: EuroVelo 6 (along the Danube) and EuroVelo 13 (Iron Curtain Trail). Flat, well-maintained paths suitable for leisure cycling. City bikesharing with yellow bikes available at dozens of stations throughout the city.
descriptionHebrew: רכיבת אופניים. במסלולים מסומנים. בברטיסלבה.
address: Multiple starting points along Danube riverfront, Bratislava, Slovakia
priceAdult: Free (path usage); Bikesharing available at stations throughout city
notes: Cycling map available at freemap.sk. Yellow bikesharing bikes at dozens of stations in city center. Routes go to Devin area, along Danube riverfront, and connect to Vienna route. Flat terrain - easy for families. Professional guided tours also available visiting Devin area.
notesHebrew: רכיבת אופניים. במסלולים מסומנים. בוינה.

name: Chabad of Slovakia - Bratislava
description: Chabad house serving the Jewish community and visitors in Bratislava. Led by Rabbi Baruch Myers. Offers Shabbat services, Shabbat meals, kosher catering, educational programs, CTeen for teenagers, Jewish Women's Club, Camp Gan Israel, and Mommy and Me program. Kosher catering available for tourist groups, business meetings, and family celebrations. Has preschool (Lauder Gan Menachem) and after-school club (Bratislavsky Cheder Tora Or).
descriptionHebrew: בית חב"ד - שירותי יהדות, תפילות, ארוחות שבת וכשרות. ארוחות שבת בהזמנה מראש. בברטיסלבה.
notes: Phone: +421-905-964-155. Rabbi Baruch Myers leads the community. Offers Shabbat meals - must contact in advance to arrange. Kosher catering available. For Shabbat Aug 8-9 2026, contact ahead to confirm meal arrangements. Has educational programs for all ages including infants (Mommy and Me). Mikveh available - contact rabbi for details.
notesHebrew: שירותי כשרות. ארוחות שבת בהזמנה מראש.

name: Hangair Action Sports Academy
description: Indoor action sports facility in Bratislava offering trampolines, skateboarding, scooter, BMX, and freeski activities. Programs for ages 2+ including parent-child classes for toddlers, children's sports courses, and adult programs. Also offers summer day camps and birthday parties.
descriptionHebrew: פעילות הרפתקנית ומרגשת. בברטיסלבה.
address: Pri starom letisku 3b, Vajnory 831 07 Bratislava, Slovakia
priceChild: Contact for pricing - programs from age 2-3
notes: Programs by age: 2-3 years parent-child morning exercise; 3+ children's courses; individual training all ages. Hall reservations available at rezervacie.hangair.sk. Outdoor garden area. Good rainy-day option. Summer camps available. Email info@hangair.sk.
notesHebrew: פעילות הרפתקנית ומרגשת.

name: Twin City Liner - Bratislava to Vienna Fast Ferry
description: Fast catamaran ferry service between Bratislava and Vienna via the Danube river. A scenic and efficient 75-minute journey between the two capitals.
descriptionHebrew: שייט והפלגה. על נהר הדנובה. בוינה.
notes: 75-minute scenic river journey. Operates May-September. 15-minute check-in before departure. Can combine Bratislava and Vienna visits.
notesHebrew: פעילות מים מרגשת. בוינה.
distanceFromMalatiny: 280 ק"מ, ~3 שעות נסיעה to Bratislava port

name: Vodácke Centrum - Little Danube (Malý Dunaj) Kayaking
nameHebrew: מרכז חתירה - שייט קיאק בדנובה הקטנה
description: Gentle kayak/canoe trip on the Little Danube (Malý Dunaj), a calm branch of the Danube river near Bratislava. Perfect for families and beginners - calm current, beautiful nature, and wildlife. The Little Danube meanders through wetlands and forests, offering a peaceful paddling experience.
descriptionHebrew: שייט בקיאקים. במים רגועים, מתאים למתחילים. בברטיסלבה.
notes: Very calm water - excellent for families and first-timers. Season: spring to late autumn. Phone: +421 915 438 156. Email: info@vodackecentrum.sk. Various route lengths available. Can combine with Bratislava city visit. Baby not recommended on kayak but calm conditions.
notesHebrew: שייט בקיאקים. במים רגועים, מתאים למתחילים. בברטיסלבה.
distanceFromMalatiny: 310 ק"מ, כ-3 שעות נסיעה (suitable for Bratislava part of trip)
tags: מרכז חתירה - שייט קיאק בדנובה הקטנה

name: Vodácke Centrum - Vienna to Bratislava Sea Kayak Trip
nameHebrew: מרכז חתירה - שייט קיאק מוינה לברטיסלבה
description: An epic full-day sea kayak journey on the Danube from Vienna (Austria) to Bratislava (Slovakia). Paddle approximately 60 km through the Donau-Auen National Park, passing through Austrian and Slovak landscapes. A unique cross-border paddling adventure suitable for those with some experience.
descriptionHebrew: שייט בקיאקים. בוינה. אורך המסלול: 60 ק"מ.
priceChild: Not recommended for young children due to length
notes: Full-day trip requiring reasonable fitness. Some paddling experience recommended due to distance. Phone: +421 915 438 156. Season: spring to autumn. A unique way to travel between Vienna and Bratislava. Not suitable for young children or baby due to duration.
notesHebrew: פעילות מים מרגשת. בוינה.
distanceFromMalatiny: 310 ק"מ to Bratislava (suitable for Vienna/Bratislava part of trip)
tags: מרכז חתירה - שייט קיאק מוינה לברטיסלבה

name: Zelezna Studienka - Kamzik Chairlift & Forest Park
description: Forest recreation area in Bratislava with a chairlift to Kamzik TV Tower offering panoramic views. The area features walking and cycling trails through the forest, playgrounds, and restaurants. The chairlift ride provides aerial views of the forest canopy.
descriptionHebrew: רכיבת אופניים. במסלולים מסומנים. בברטיסלבה.
notes: Cable car/chairlift accessible. Multiple hiking paths of varying difficulty. Cycling paths available. Restaurants and refreshments at both base and summit. Kamzik TV Tower observation deck offers 360-degree views. Popular weekend destination for Bratislava families.
notesHebrew: רכיבת אופניים. בברטיסלבה.

name: Budakeszi Wildlife Park and Adventure Park
nameHebrew: פארק חיות הבר ופארק הרפתקאות בודקסי
description: A wildlife park featuring over 50 Hungarian animal species combined with a forest adventure park offering 6 difficulty levels of rope courses. The adventure park includes courses at various heights from 1.5m to 8m, featuring zip lines, rope bridges, and a 90-meter slide. Located in a beautiful forest setting just 20 minutes from Budapest center. Also has a petting zoo, narrow-gauge railway, and two playgrounds.
descriptionHebrew: פארק חבלים בגובה עם מסלולי טיפוס מאתגרים. כולל זיפליין. בבודפשט.
priceAdult: ~16 EUR (6300 HUF adventure park only; 8600 HUF combo with wildlife park)
priceChild: ~12 EUR (4800 HUF adventure park; 6600 HUF combo, for children 100-140cm height)
notes: Adventure park open daily 10:00-18:00 in summer (June-August), ticket sales until 16:45. Minimum height 100cm for children's courses. Course E (extreme) is 18+ only. Course F (slides) is 10+ only. Closed shoes and appropriate clothing mandatory. Groups of 10+ must book 72 hours in advance. Baby-friendly areas in wildlife park section.
notesHebrew: מגלשת הרים (בובסלד) - נסיעה מרגשת במורד ההר על מסלול מתכת.
tags: פארק חיות הבר ופארק הרפתקאות בודקסי

name: Danube Bend Day Trip by Boat
description: A scenic boat trip from Budapest northward through the dramatic Danube Bend, one of Hungary's most beautiful natural landscapes where the river makes a sharp turn between forested hills. Stops include the charming artist village of Szentendre, the dramatic hilltop ruins of Visegrad, and the grand basilica town of Esztergom. Multiple operators offer these trips with varying durations from half-day to full-day excursions.
descriptionHebrew: שייט והפלגה. על נהר הדנובה. בבודפשט.
address: Various departure points along Pest embankment, Budapest (Vigado ter pier is main departure)
priceAdult: ~15-25 EUR depending on route and operator
notes: Multiple operators including Mahart PassNave (scheduled service) and Dunarama (private speedboat). Full day trip Budapest-Esztergom takes ~5 hours one-way by scheduled boat. Szentendre is closest (~1.5 hours). Boats run daily in summer. Can return by bus/train if one-way preferred. Stunning scenery through the bend. Book in advance in peak summer.
notesHebrew: שייט והפלגה. בבודפשט.
distanceFromMalatiny: ~250 ק"מ to Budapest departure point, כ-2.5-3 שעות by car

name: Margaret Island Cycling and Recreation
description: A 2.5 km long car-free island in the middle of the Danube, perfect for cycling, running, and family recreation. Features a 5.5 km running/cycling track circling the island, plus rental of various bikes (tandems, family bikes, electric bikes, pedal cars). Also has a musical fountain, Japanese garden, small zoo, large playground, and open-air sports facilities. Completely flat terrain ideal for all ages.
descriptionHebrew: רכיבה על אופניים חשמליים. אורך המסלול: 2.5 ק"מ.
priceChild: Free entry; family bike rental ~10-15 EUR/hour
notes: Car-free island accessible by bus or tram. Bike and pedal car rentals available at multiple points on the island. Large playground at the southern end. Musical fountain shows in summer. Completely flat - excellent for families with strollers. Bring water and snacks. Free WiFi in some areas. Can easily spend half a day here.
notesHebrew: רכיבת אופניים.

name: Normafa Park - Buda Hills Hiking
description: A beloved green oasis in the Buda Hills at around 450m elevation, offering easy to moderate hiking trails through beech forests with scenic viewpoints over Budapest. Features well-marked trails suitable for families, a large playground, and several food vendors. Starting point for many Buda Hills hikes including trails to Janos-hegy and connections to the Children's Railway (Normafa station).
descriptionHebrew: מסלול הליכה עם נופים פנורמיים מרהיבים. בבודפשט.
suitableFor: baby in stroller on main paths
notes: Easy access by bus 21A from Szell Kalman ter (15 minutes). Multiple hiking trails of varying difficulty from the area. Large playground for younger children. Cafe and food options available. Can combine with Children's Railway (station here). Best for a morning or half-day outing. Free parking available but fills up on weekends.
notesHebrew: מסלול הליכה קל ומשפחתי.

name: Adventoura Slovakia
description: Professional adventure tour operator based in Poprad offering multi-activity guided experiences in the High Tatras. Specializes in bear watching e-bike tours (combining wildlife observation with electric bikes into remote valleys), guided hiking through Slovak Paradise National Park (Sucha Bela Gorge with ladders, bridges, waterfalls), and via ferrata climbing. Run by Erik Sevcik with 22 years guiding experience. Full English service. Activities range from moderate to challenging difficulty.
descriptionHebrew: רכיבה על אופניים חשמליים. בהרי הטטרה הגבוהים.
priceAdult: EUR 150-190 per activity (Hiking EUR 150, Bear E-Bike EUR 170, Igloo EUR 190)
priceChild: Same price, minimum age 6 for hiking, 10 for bear watching
notes: English service confirmed. Advance booking required via website. Bear watching starts at 5AM. Hiking in Sucha Bela rated difficulty 5/5 - requires sturdy boots, not for those afraid of heights. Minimum group 2 people, max 7 for bear watching. Transportation from Poprad included. Season: Jun-Oct for bear watching, May-Oct for hiking. NOT suitable for baby in carrier on most activities.
notesHebrew: מסלול טיול בטבע.
distanceFromMalatiny: 70 ק"מ east, כ-1 שעה נסיעה to Poprad meeting point

name: Bachledka Treetop Walk (Chodnik korunami stromov)
description: A spectacular 1,234-meter elevated walkway through the treetops of the Belianske Tatras, culminating in a 32-meter observation tower with panoramic views. Features 6 stops (3 educational, 3 entertainment), a 67-meter dry toboggan slide, adrenaline net, and observation tower with binoculars. Fully wheelchair and stroller accessible throughout. One of the most popular family attractions in the High Tatras region.
descriptionHebrew: מגלשת הרים (בובסלד) - נסיעה מרגשת במורד ההר על מסלול מתכת. בהרי הטטרה הגבוהים.
priceAdult: EUR 30 (trail + cable car round trip) / EUR 15 (trail only)
priceChild: EUR 24 (trail + cable car, ages 3-14) / EUR 12 (trail only)
notes: Open daily Jul-Aug 9:00-18:00. Last entry 1 hour before closing. Minimum age 3 years. No pets allowed (free kennels provided). Online tickets recommended. Cable car access from valley or hiking trails available.
notesHebrew: מסלול טיול בטבע.

name: Belianska Cave (High Tatras)
description: The only show cave open to the public in the High Tatras, featuring spectacular flowstone waterfalls, pagoda stalagmites, and underground pools. Notable chambers include the Musical Hall, Palm Hall, and White Hall. Home to seven bat species. Located on Kobylí Hill within Tatra National Park at 890m elevation.
descriptionHebrew: מפל מים מרשים בלב הטבע. בהרי הטטרה הגבוהים.
address: Tatranská Kotlina, High Tatras, Tatra National Park, Slovakia
notes: Tour: 70 min, 1370m route, 860 steps, 125m elevation change. Temperature 5-6.3°C. Hours: 9:00-16:00 hourly. No reservations. 1km uphill walk from parking (25 min, 122m elevation gain). NOT suitable for babies/strollers or those with mobility issues. Students/60+ 14 EUR. No food/drink inside.
notesHebrew: אתר טבע מרהיב.

name: Dunajec River Traditional Wooden Raft Trip (Pltníctvo na Dunajci)
description: Traditional wooden raft trip through the spectacular Dunajec River Gorge in Pieniny National Park, on the Slovak-Polish border. Raftsmen in traditional folk costumes navigate 11 km through dramatic limestone canyon with cliffs up to 300m high. A UNESCO-recognized tradition dating back centuries. The gorge scenery is breathtaking - one of Slovakia's most iconic experiences.
descriptionHebrew: קניון מרהיב עם מסלולי הליכה, סולמות וגשרים. אורך המסלול: 11 ק"מ.
address: Majere 34, 061 01 Majere, Slovakia (starting port near Červený Kláštor)
notes: Duration: approximately 1 hour 45 minutes for 11 km. Very calm water - no rapids, safe for all ages including babies. Season: typically May-October. Advance telephone booking recommended for groups. Return from Lesnica by bus or hiking trail. Contact Rudolf Velička at +421 905 294 699. Group rates available.
notesHebrew: מסלול טיול בטבע. אורך המסלול: 11 ק"מ.

name: Hrebienok & Cold Stream Waterfalls (Vodopády Studeného potoka)
description: Hrebienok is a scenic viewpoint and hiking hub accessible by funicular from Starý Smokovec. From Hrebienok, a well-marked trail leads to the Cold Stream Waterfalls (Vodopády Studeného potoka) - a series of cascades in a forested mountain valley. One of the most popular family-friendly hikes in the High Tatras.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול הליכה עם נופים פנורמיים מרהיבים. בהרי הטטרה הגבוהים. מתאים למשפחות.
address: Hrebienok, Starý Smokovec, 062 01 Vysoké Tatry, Slovakia
suitableFor: baby in carrier (funicular + easy trail section)
notes: Difficulty: EASY to Hrebienok (funicular), EASY-MEDIUM trail to waterfalls (approx 1-1.5 hours each way from Hrebienok). The first part of the trail is wide and well-maintained. Baby carrier feasible for the easier sections. The 10-year-old should manage the full trail to the waterfalls. Famous ice sculptures displayed here in winter.
notesHebrew: מפל מים מרשים בלב הטבע. הגישה דרך שביל טיול.
distanceFromMalatiny: ~95 ק"מ, כ-1 שעה 20 דקות נסיעה to Starý Smokovec

name: Hrebienok Funicular & Trails
description: Funicular railway from Stary Smokovec up to Hrebienok mountain station, gateway to High Tatras hiking trails, waterfalls, and mountain lakes. Popular starting point for family hikes.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול הליכה קל ומשפחתי. בהרי הטטרה הגבוהים.
notes: Connected to Tatra Electric Railway. Starting point for numerous hiking trails. Waterfall trails accessible from here. Relatively easy access via funicular.
notesHebrew: מסלול הליכה קל ומשפחתי.

name: Hrebienok Funicular and Trails
description: Funicular railway from Stary Smokovec to Hrebienok (1,285m), starting point for family-friendly hikes with waterfalls and scenic mountain views. Easy trails accessible for families.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול הליכה עם נופים פנורמיים מרהיבים. מתאים למשפחות.
notes: Easy trails from the top. Good starting point for families. Multiple trail options of varying difficulty. Waterfalls accessible from here.
notesHebrew: מפל מים מרשים בלב הטבע. הגישה דרך שביל טיול.

name: Kmeťov vodopád (Kmeť Waterfall)
description: The highest waterfall in Slovakia at approximately 80-90 meters, a glacial waterfall in the High Tatras at 1,245m elevation. Spectacular cascade dropping from alpine heights surrounded by pristine mountain scenery in the Nefcerka valley.
descriptionHebrew: מפל מים מרשים בלב הטבע. אחד המפלים הגבוהים באזור. בהרי הטטרה הגבוהים.
address: Nefcerka valley, Vysoké Tatry, Slovakia (accessed from Štrbské pleso)
notes: Difficulty: HARD. Requires a demanding mountain hike from Štrbské pleso (approx 2.5-3 hours one way). NOT suitable for baby or 10-year-old due to steep, rocky terrain and significant elevation gain. Trail involves alpine sections. Best for the older/fitter family members only.
notesHebrew: מסלול הליכה קל ומשפחתי.
distanceFromMalatiny: ~85 ק"מ drive to Štrbské pleso trailhead, then 2.5-3h hike

name: Liptovská Mara - Swimming Beaches & Water Recreation
nameHebrew: אגם ליפטובסקה מארה - חופי רחצה ופנאי מים
description: Liptovská Mara is Slovakia's largest artificial lake/dam, offering swimming, sunbathing on beaches, and various water recreation. Multiple beach areas around the lake provide free or low-cost access to swimming with mountain views. The water warms up sufficiently for swimming in July-August. Several beaches have facilities and shallow areas for children.
descriptionHebrew: אגם הרים קרחוני עם מים צלולים ונוף הררי מרהיב. ניתן לשחות. באזור ליפטוב.
address: Liptovská Mara, multiple access points around the lake, Liptov region, Slovakia
notes: Multiple beaches: Liptovský Trnovec, Bobrovník, Maladinovo. July-August best for swimming. Some beaches have playgrounds and changing facilities. Free parking at some locations. Combine with water sports rentals nearby. Baby-friendly at shallow beach areas.
notesHebrew: מתחם משחקים לילדים. באזור ליפטוב.
distanceFromMalatiny: 15-22 ק"מ, כ-15-25 דקות נסיעה depending on beach
tags: אגם ליפטובסקה מארה - חופי רחצה ופנאי מים

name: Lomnicky Stit Cable Car Experience
description: Iconic cable car ride to the summit of Lomnicky Stit (2,634m), one of the highest peaks in the High Tatras accessible by cable car. Breathtaking panoramic views from the 'roof of the Tatras'. Intermediate stops at Skalnate Pleso alpine lake (1,751m) which is spectacular in itself. One of the most iconic High Tatras experiences.
descriptionHebrew: אגם יפהפה עם אפשרויות פנאי. בהרי הטטרה הגבוהים.
notes: Summit tickets sell out - book in advance via GoPass! Limited capacity. Allow half day. Weather dependent - peak may be in clouds. Dress warmly even in summer (can be 5-10C at top). Restaurant at Skalnate Pleso. Observatory at summit. Stroller NOT suitable for summit, OK to Skalnate Pleso.
notesHebrew: אגם יפהפה עם אפשרויות פנאי.

name: Lomnický štít Cable Car & Observatory
description: The second-highest peak in the High Tatras at 2,634m, accessible by cable car from Tatranská Lomnica. Features a solar observatory and weather station at the summit. Breathtaking views of the entire Tatra range and surrounding valleys. Visitors stay at the peak for 50 minutes.
descriptionHebrew: רכבל/כיסא מעלית לפסגת ההר עם נופים מדהימים. בהרי הטטרה הגבוהים.
priceAdult: ~39-45 EUR (cable car round trip to summit)
notes: Difficulty: EASY (cable car does the work). Visitors are allowed only 50 minutes at the peak. Cable car closes in May for maintenance - confirm August operation. Book in advance during peak season as capacity is limited. Very cold at the top (average near 0C year-round). Alpine climate. Intermediate stop at Skalnaté pleso (1,751m) also worthwhile.
notesHebrew: אגם יפהפה עם אפשרויות פנאי.

name: Loď Mária - Sightseeing Boat Trip on Liptovská Mara
nameHebrew: ספינת מריה - שייט תיור באגם ליפטובסקה מארה
description: Scenic passenger boat cruise on Liptovská Mara lake aboard the 'Loď Mária' (Ship Maria). A relaxing sightseeing cruise offering panoramic views of the High Tatras, Low Tatras, and surrounding mountains from the water. Suitable for all ages and a comfortable way to enjoy the lake scenery without physical effort.
descriptionHebrew: אגם הרים קרחוני עם מים צלולים ונוף הררי מרהיב. אפשרות להשכרת סירות. באזור ליפטוב.
address: Liptovská Mara, Liptovský Trnovec, Slovakia (departs from MaraFun area)
notes: Tickets available through funcenter.sk. Relaxing cruise suitable for the whole family including baby. No physical effort required. Available during summer season when weather permits. Combined well with other MaraFun activities.
notesHebrew: שייט והפלגה.
tags: ספינת מריה - שייט תיור באגם ליפטובסקה מארה

name: MaraFun Water Sport School & Rental - Liptovská Mara
nameHebrew: מאראפאן - בית ספר לספורט מים על אגם ליפטובסקה מארה
description: Comprehensive water sports center on Liptovská Mara, Slovakia's largest artificial lake. Offers paddleboarding (SUP), kayaking, jet skiing, wakeboarding, water skiing, banana boat rides, flyboarding, water bicycles, and motorized speedboats. Also has a kids zone with trampolines, slides with splash pools, and water rollers. Restaurant on-site. Described as 'the best water sports school on Liptovská Mara'.
descriptionHebrew: שייט בקיאקים. באזור ליפטוב.
address: Liptovský Trnovec, 032 22, Slovakia (on Liptovská Mara shore)
priceAdult: SUP from 13 EUR, boat tour 10 EUR, other activities vary
priceChild: Kids zone included for accommodation guests, 50% discount on main zone
notes: Hours: 9:00-19:00 daily, closed during bad weather. Book tickets online at funcenter.sk. Phone: +421 918 391 444. Email: info@marafun.sk. Glamping accommodation available on-site. Restaurant 'Námorník' with grilled food and pizza directly on the lake. Great for full-day family outing.
notesHebrew: אגם יפהפה עם אפשרויות פנאי.
tags: מאראפאן - בית ספר לספורט מים על אגם ליפטובסקה מארה

name: Marina Liptov - Boat Rental & Sightseeing Cruises
nameHebrew: מרינה ליפטוב - השכרת סירות ושייט תיור
description: Full-service marina on Liptovská Mara offering boat rentals, sightseeing cruises, yachting services, and harbor facilities. Offers motorboats, sailboats, and various watercraft for rent. The sightseeing cruises provide stunning views of the surrounding mountains including the High and Low Tatras from the water. Also supports windsurfing, paddleboarding, rowing, kayaking, and fishing.
descriptionHebrew: שייט בקיאקים. באזור ליפטוב.
priceAdult: Contact for 2026 pricing (varies by boat type)
priceChild: Children ride on boats with adults
notes: Hours: Monday-Sunday 9:00-19:00. Phone: +421 902 605 605. Email: rezervacie@marinaliptov.sk. Booking system at booking.marinaliptov.sk. Offers yachting, windsurfing, paddleboarding, rowing, kayaking, and fishing. Calm lake suitable for families.
notesHebrew: שייט בקיאקים. במים רגועים, מתאים למתחילים. באזור ליפטוב.
tags: מרינה ליפטוב - השכרת סירות ושייט תיור

name: Marina Liptov - Water Sports & Boat Rental on Liptovska Mara
description: Full-service marina and water sports center on Liptovska Mara reservoir offering extensive boat rentals: motorboats (petrol and electric), rowboats, kayaks (single and double), paddleboards (including 6-8 person JUMBO SUPs), jet skis, sailboats, aluminum boats with outboard motors, and catamaran sightseeing cruises with captain. Also offers glamping accommodation and restaurant on-site. The lake is the largest in Slovakia with mountain backdrop.
descriptionHebrew: שייט בקיאקים. באזור ליפטוב.
priceAdult: Contact for current prices: +421 902 605 605 or rezervacie@marinaliptov.sk
priceChild: Contact for prices - family-friendly facilities available
notes: Hours: 10:00-19:00 daily in summer. Advance reservation recommended: rezervacie@marinaliptov.sk or +421 902 605 605. Catamaran cruise with captain suitable for all ages including baby. JUMBO paddleboard (6-8 person) great for family activity. Jet ski requires adult operation. On-site restaurant and glamping available. Large reservoir with mountain views.
notesHebrew: שייט והפלגה. באזור ליפטוב.

name: Paddleboard Maladinovo - SUP on Liptovská Mara
description: Stand-up paddleboard (SUP) rental station at Maladinovo on the shores of Liptovská Mara. Paddleboarding on the calm lake waters with views of the Tatras mountains. SUP is accessible for beginners and provides a fun full-body workout on the water. The calm lake conditions make it ideal for first-time paddleboarders.
descriptionHebrew: אגם הרים קרחוני עם מים צלולים ונוף הררי מרהיב. באזור ליפטוב.
address: Maladinovo, Liptovský Mikuláš, Slovakia (Liptovská Mara shore)
priceChild: Similar pricing, children should be accompanied
notes: Calm lake conditions ideal for beginners. Life jackets available. Swimming ability recommended. Not suitable for baby. Best in calm weather conditions. Check local weather before going. Season: June-September.
notesHebrew: אגם יפהפה עם אפשרויות פנאי. ניתן לשחות.

name: Pltnictvo Dunajec - Traditional Wooden Raft Trips
description: Traditional wooden raft (plte) trips through the stunning Dunajec River gorge in Pieniny National Park. An 11 km journey lasting approximately 1 hour 45 minutes passing beneath the famous Tri Koruny (Three Crowns) peaks on the Polish side. A unique cultural and nature experience combining gentle river floating with dramatic cliff scenery. Family-friendly, no experience needed - you sit on the raft while skilled raftsmen navigate.
descriptionHebrew: קניון מרהיב עם מסלולי הליכה, סולמות וגשרים. אורך המסלול: 11 ק"מ. מתאים למשפחות.
notes: Very family-friendly - passengers sit on traditional wooden raft, no paddling required. Suitable even for baby in carrier. Departure from port beyond Majere village. Contact Rudolf Velicka: +421 905 294 699, velicka@pltnictvo.sk. Group rates available by phone arrangement. Distance 11km, duration ~1h45min. Stunning Pieniny gorge scenery. Can combine with Rafting Pieniny for more active options.
notesHebrew: רפטינג. מתאים למתחילים ומשפחות. מתאים למשפחות.

name: Popradské pleso (Poprad Lake)
description: A stunning glacial moraine-dammed lake at 1,494m elevation, one of the most visited spots in the High Tatras. Situated on the Tatranská magistrála hiking path, serving as a starting point for hikes to Rysy peak. Features the Symbolic Cemetery memorial nearby. Mountain hut available for refreshments.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול טיול בטבע. בהרי הטטרה הגבוהים.
priceAdult: Free (parking at Štrbské pleso then hike)
notes: Difficulty: MEDIUM. Reached by hiking from Štrbské pleso (approx 1.5 hours one way, well-marked trail with moderate elevation gain). NOT stroller-friendly - baby carrier required. The trail is well-maintained but rocky in parts. A good challenge for the 10-year-old. Mountain hut at the lake for food/drinks.
notesHebrew: מסלול טיול בטבע.
distanceFromMalatiny: ~85 ק"מ drive to Štrbské pleso trailhead, then 1.5h hike

name: Rafting Adventure - Belá River Whitewater Rafting
description: Whitewater rafting on the Belá River, described as the most intense river in the Liptov region. The Belá is a mountain river flowing from the High Tatras with rapids classified WW II-III. Spring rafting offers the most adrenaline with higher water levels. Professional guides, equipment provided. One of the best whitewater experiences in Slovakia.
descriptionHebrew: רפטינג במים סוערים. עם מדריך מקצועי. באזור ליפטוב.
address: Areál vodného slalomu Ondreja Cibáka, 031 01 Liptovský Mikuláš, Slovakia
priceChild: 25-35 EUR (contact for exact pricing, minimum age applies)
notes: Minimum age typically 10-12 for Belá river due to rapids intensity. Advance reservation required at least 1 day ahead. Season: April-October. Difficulty: moderate to challenging depending on water level. Not suitable for baby. Call +421 948 906 506 for booking.
notesHebrew: פעילות מים מרגשת.

name: Rafting Adventure - Váh River Family Float
nameHebrew: רפטינג הרפתקאות - שיט משפחתי בנהר ואה
description: A gentler rafting/floating experience on the Váh river, described as 'less demanding' and suitable for families and romantic outings. The Váh is Slovakia's longest river and the section near Liptovský Mikuláš offers calm stretches with beautiful mountain scenery. Ideal for families with younger children who want a water adventure without intense rapids.
descriptionHebrew: רפטינג. באזור ליפטוב.
address: Areál vodného slalomu Ondreja Cibáka, 031 01 Liptovský Mikuláš, Slovakia
notes: Less demanding than Belá river - suitable for beginners and families. Advance reservation required. Season: April-October daily 09:00-19:00. Liptov Region Card holders get 10% discount. Not suitable for baby in carrier. Call +421 948 906 506.
notesHebrew: פעילות מים מרגשת. באזור ליפטוב.
tags: רפטינג הרפתקאות - שיט משפחתי בנהר ואה

name: Rafting Pieniny (Dunajec River Adventures)
description: Adventure operator at Cerveny Klastor offering rafting, canoeing, kayaking on the Dunajec River through the spectacular Pieniny gorge. Explicitly designed for beginners and families with no prior experience needed. Also offers mountain bike rentals and post-rafting hiking trails. Multilingual service (Slovak, English, Polish, Hungarian). The Dunajec forms the Slovak-Polish border with dramatic cliff scenery.
descriptionHebrew: רפטינג. מתאים למתחילים ומשפחות.
priceAdult: Contact for current prices (advance reservation encouraged)
priceChild: Contact - explicitly family-friendly, suitable for children
notes: English, Polish, and Hungarian service available. Season: April 15 - October 15. Hours: daily 9:00-18:00. Advance reservation encouraged: +421 907 477 412. Suitable for complete beginners and families with children (explicitly stated). Instructor guidance included. Post-rafting meals available at on-site shelter. Can combine with traditional wooden raft trip (Pltnictvo) nearby. Bike rental also available for Pieniny trails.
notesHebrew: רפטינג. מתאים למתחילים ומשפחות. עם מדריך מקצועי.

name: Skalnaté pleso (Rocky Lake) & Observatory
description: A mountain lake at 1,751m elevation, accessible by cable car from Tatranská Lomnica. The intermediate station on the way to Lomnický štít. Features an astronomical observatory, restaurant, and easy walking trails with spectacular views of the High Tatras peaks. Much more accessible than the summit.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול הליכה עם נופים פנורמיים מרהיבים. בהרי הטטרה הגבוהים.
address: Skalnaté pleso, Tatranská Lomnica, 059 60 Vysoké Tatry, Slovakia
priceAdult: ~22-28 EUR (cable car round trip to Skalnaté pleso)
suitableFor: baby-friendly (cable car + flat area at lake)
notes: Difficulty: EASY (cable car access, flat walking area around the lake). More affordable than going all the way to Lomnický štít summit. Easy walks around the lake suitable for all ages. Baby stroller might work on the flat areas. Observatory occasionally open to visitors. Good restaurant at the station.
notesHebrew: אגם יפהפה עם אפשרויות פנאי.
distanceFromMalatiny: ~100 ק"מ, כ-1 שעה 30 דקות נסיעה to Tatranská Lomnica base

name: Strbske Pleso Chairlift to Solisko and Boat Rides
description: Chairlift ride up to Mt. Solisko for stunning panoramic views of the High Tatras and Strbske Pleso glacial lake below. Also features boat rentals on the iconic Strbske Pleso tarn - one of the most photographed lakes in Slovakia. A classic High Tatras experience combining mountain views with lake relaxation.
descriptionHebrew: אגם הרים קרחוני עם מים צלולים ונוף הררי מרהיב. אפשרות להשכרת סירות. בהרי הטטרה הגבוהים.
notes: Boat rental separate from chairlift. Hotel FIS nearby. Beautiful hiking trails from top of Solisko. Lake walk around Strbske Pleso is flat and stroller-friendly (about 30 min). Good starting point for many hiking trails.
notesHebrew: מסלול טיול בטבע.

name: Strbske Pleso Lake
description: Stunning alpine lake in the heart of the High Tatras mountains. Offers boat rentals in summer, scenic walking loop around the lake (2.5km, ~1 hour), and serves as starting point for multiple hiking trails to peaks and other lakes. The highest inhabited area in Slovakia.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול הליכה אלפיני. בהרי הטטרה הגבוהים.
notes: Easy lake loop trail is lit at night. Swimming prohibited. Boat rentals available in summer. 30 min drive from Poprad. Large parking available. Direct rail service available.
notesHebrew: אגם יפהפה עם אפשרויות פנאי. ניתן לשחות. אפשרות להשכרת סירות.

name: Strbske Pleso to Jamske Pleso Trail
description: Easy family-friendly hiking trail (5.2 km) through forest and along mountain streams, connecting Strbske Pleso to the smaller Jamske Pleso lake.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול הליכה קל ומשפחתי. אורך המסלול: 5.2 ק"מ. מתאים למשפחות.
notes: Easy difficulty. About 1.5 hours. Suitable for older children. Through forest with stream crossings.
notesHebrew: אתר טבע מרהיב.

name: Zdiar Village and Goral Culture
description: Picturesque traditional village of 1,300 residents on the Polish border in the High Tatras. Authentic Goral ethnic community with colorful wooden houses and traditional culture. Starting point for scenic hikes.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול טיול בטבע. בהרי הטטרה הגבוהים.
notes: 40 km from Poprad (40 min drive). Bus service from Poprad. Multiple hiking trails nearby. Near Bachledka treetop walk. Traditional wooden architecture with colorful decorations.
notesHebrew: מסלול טיול בטבע. אורך המסלול: 40 ק"מ.

name: Zelene Pleso (Green Lake)
description: A stunning mountain lake with crystal-clear waters that appear naturally green. Surrounded by dramatic mountain peaks in the heart of the High Tatras.
descriptionHebrew: אגם הרים קרחוני עם מים צלולים ונוף הררי מרהיב. בהרי הטטרה הגבוהים.
notes: Approximately 3 hours hiking each way. Easy to moderate difficulty. Best in summer months.
notesHebrew: מסלול הליכה קל ומשפחתי.

name: Štrbské Pleso Mountain Lake
description: Iconic glacial mountain lake at 1,346m elevation in the High Tatras. Beautiful walking path around the lake, starting point for hikes to Kriván and Rysy peaks. Accessible by rack railway.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול טיול בטבע. בהרי הטטרה הגבוהים.
notes: Flat walk around lake suitable for strollers. Rack railway from Strba village. Starting point for mountain hikes. Restaurants and cafes nearby. Very popular - arrive early.
notesHebrew: מסלול טיול בטבע.

name: Štrbské pleso (Štrbské Lake)
description: The second-largest glacial lake on Slovakia's High Tatras side, at 1,346m elevation. A flat, paved path circles the entire lake (approx 5km), making it one of the most accessible mountain lake walks in the Tatras. Stunning alpine scenery with peaks reflected in the water. Frozen 155 days/year but beautiful in August.
descriptionHebrew: אגם הרים קרחוני עם מים צלולים ונוף הררי מרהיב. בהרי הטטרה הגבוהים.
notes: Difficulty: EASY. Fully stroller-friendly paved circular path around the lake. Electric train (TEŽ) stops directly at the lake. No booking required. Very busy in summer - arrive early morning. Restaurants and facilities available.
notesHebrew: אגם יפהפה עם אפשרויות פנאי.

name: Štrbské pleso to Popradské pleso Trail (Tatranská Magistrála section)
description: A section of the famous Tatranská magistrála long-distance trail connecting two beautiful glacial lakes. This is one of the most scenic and relatively gentle sections of the trail, passing through alpine meadows and conifer forests with views of High Tatra peaks.
descriptionHebrew: אגם הרים קרחוני עם מים צלולים ונוף הררי מרהיב.
address: Štrbské pleso to Popradské pleso, Vysoké Tatry, Slovakia
notes: Difficulty: EASY-MEDIUM. Approximately 4-5 km one way, 1.5-2 hours. Well-marked red trail. Moderate elevation changes. Baby carrier works well. The 10-year-old should manage this without problems. Mountain hut at Popradské pleso for food/rest before return. Return same way or continue on trail system.
notesHebrew: אגם הרים קרחוני עם מים צלולים ונוף הררי מרהיב. אורך המסלול: 5 ק"מ.
distanceFromMalatiny: ~85 ק"מ drive to Štrbské pleso starting point

name: Boat Trip on Liptovská Mara (Loď Nellisa/Mara)
description: Boat tours on Liptovska Mara reservoir aboard the Nellisa ship or Mara catamaran. Scenic cruise with views of surrounding mountains and the submerged village ruins.
descriptionHebrew: שייט והפלגה. באזור ליפטוב.
notes: Scenic cruise suitable for all ages including babies. Views of submerged churches visible when water is low. Marina Liptov departure point.
notesHebrew: שייט והפלגה. באזור ליפטוב.

name: Chopok - Jasná Cable Car Viewpoint
description: The third-highest peak of the Low Tatras at 2,024m, offering panoramic views of the High Tatras, Liptov basin, and Hron valley. Accessible by cable car from Jasná resort (north side) or from the south. The windiest place with a weather station in Slovakia. Stunning 360-degree views from the summit.
descriptionHebrew: רכבל/כיסא מעלית לפסגת ההר עם נופים מדהימים. באזור ליפטוב.
address: Jasná, Demänovská Dolina, 032 51 Liptovský Mikuláš, Slovakia
notes: Difficulty: EASY (via cable car). Cable car operates in summer season (June-September). Dress warmly even in August - it can be cold and very windy at the top. Short walks available from the top station. Restaurant/chalet (Kamenná chata) near summit. No booking required but expect queues in peak season.
notesHebrew: רכבל/כיסא מעלית לפסגת ההר עם נופים מדהימים. מסעדה בתחנה העליונה.
distanceFromMalatiny: ~45 ק"מ, כ-45 דקות נסיעה to Jasná base station

name: Cyklokorytnička Cycling Route
description: Family-friendly cycling route near Ruzomberok following a scenic valley path. Easy terrain suitable for families with children. Part of 900+ km cycling network in Liptov.
descriptionHebrew: רכיבת אופניים. במסלולים מסומנים. באזור ליפטוב. מתאים למשפחות.
notes: Easy flat terrain. Family-friendly. Can rent bikes in Ruzomberok. Part of larger cycling network. Summer event July 18, 2026.
notesHebrew: רכיבת אופניים. מתאים למשפחות.
distanceFromMalatiny: ~10 ק"מ, כ-12 דקות נסיעה to start

name: Dedinky Lake (Palcmanska Masa)
description: The largest and clearest lake in Slovak Paradise national park. Perfect for swimming, picnicking, and fishing. Easy access suitable for families with young children.
descriptionHebrew: אגם יפהפה עם אפשרויות פנאי. ניתן לשחות. בגן העדן הסלובקי.
notes: Easy/family-friendly. About 1 hour around the lake. Swimming possible in summer. Excellent for young families. Southern entrance to Slovak Paradise.
notesHebrew: אגם יפהפה עם אפשרויות פנאי. ניתן לשחות. בגן העדן הסלובקי. מתאים למשפחות.

name: Demänovská Cave of Liberty
description: One of Slovakia's most beautiful show caves, featuring the underground Demänovka River, unique water lily formations in underground lakes, flowstone cascades, and the Great Lake (52m long, 7m deep). Part of the 35km+ Demänovská cave system. Temperature inside is 6-7°C. Features stunning dripstone formations and underground river crossings.
descriptionHebrew: אגם יפהפה עם אפשרויות פנאי.
address: Demänovská Valley, 13km south of Liptovský Mikuláš, Low Tatras, Slovakia
notes: Traditional tour: 60 min, 1150m, 913 steps. Long tour: 100 min, 2150m (min 10 people). Hours: 9:00-16:00 hourly. No reservations. Temperature 6-7°C - bring warm clothes. 400m walk from parking (10-15 min uphill). Not ideal for babies/strollers due to many stairs. Students/60+ 14 EUR.
notesHebrew: אתר טבע מרהיב.

name: Demänovská Cave of Liberty (Demänovská jaskyňa slobody)
description: The most visited cave in Slovakia, with 8,126m of passages (1,800m open to public). Features the impressive Great Dome chamber (41m high, 75m long). Contains ancient cave bear remains. Spectacular stalactite and stalagmite formations. A cool respite from summer heat at constant underground temperature.
descriptionHebrew: מערת נטיפים מרשימה עם תצורות סלע עתיקות.
notes: Difficulty: EASY (paved paths inside cave). Guided tours only, typically 60-90 minutes. Temperature inside is constant (~7C) - bring warm layers even in summer. NOT stroller-friendly due to stairs inside. Baby in carrier is possible but the cold and 90-minute duration may be challenging for an infant. Book ahead in peak season. 118,000+ visitors per year.
notesHebrew: מערה מרשימה פתוחה למבקרים עם סיור מודרך.

name: Demänovská Ice Cave
description: Historic ice cave in the Low Tatras mountains, part of the extensive Demänovská cave system. Features dramatic underground chambers, stalactites and geological formations. The cave maintains temperatures of 0.4-3.0°C year-round. Note: after warm winters, the cave has lost its ice formations but remains impressive for its geological features. UNESCO-listed cave system.
descriptionHebrew: מערת קרח מרהיבה עם תצורות קרח טבעיות. אתר מורשת עולמית של אונסק"ו. בהרי הטטרה הנמוכים.
address: Demänovská Valley, near Liptovský Mikuláš, Low Tatras, Slovakia
notes: Tour: 45 min, 650m path, -48m elevation. Temperature 0-3°C - bring warm jackets! No reservations - first come first served. Hours: 9:00-16:00 hourly. Baby carrier (rucksack type) recommended for small children. Students/60+ 11 EUR. NOTE: Ice formations have melted due to warm winters. Many steps - good fitness required.
notesHebrew: אתר טבע מרהיב.

name: Demänovská Ice Cave (Demänovská ľadová jaskyňa)
description: One of the oldest known caves in Europe, first mentioned in 1299. Features stunning ice formations inside a 1,975m cave system. The visitor route is 850m long and takes approximately 45 minutes. Unique combination of ice and rock formations at various temperatures.
descriptionHebrew: מערת קרח מרהיבה עם תצורות קרח טבעיות.
notes: Difficulty: EASY-MEDIUM (some stairs, 45-minute tour). Very cold inside - dress for near-freezing temperatures. NOT stroller-friendly. Baby in carrier is possible but cold conditions make it inadvisable for an infant. Shorter tour than Cave of Liberty. Located in same valley - can combine both caves in one day trip. Wooden stairs installed 1952.
notesHebrew: מערה מרשימה פתוחה למבקרים עם סיור מודרך.

name: Demänovská dolina Valley Walk
description: A beautiful forested mountain valley in the Low Tatras at 1,109m elevation, home to both the Liberty Cave and Ice Cave. The valley offers easy walking trails along the stream connecting various points of interest. The road through the valley provides access to Jasná ski resort and Chopok cable car.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול הליכה קל ומשפחתי. בהרי הטטרה הנמוכים.
priceAdult: Free (trails), caves have separate entry fees
notes: Difficulty: EASY. Flat valley walks along the stream. Can combine with cave visits and Chopok cable car for a full day. The valley is about 15 km long. Various restaurants and facilities along the road. Stroller-friendly on the main path/road sections. Good rainy-day option (caves).
notesHebrew: מערה מרשימה פתוחה למבקרים עם סיור מודרך. אורך המסלול: 15 ק"מ.

name: Dunajec River Gorge Rafting (Slovak side)
nameHebrew: שייט רפטים על נהר דונייץ (צד סלובקי)
description: Traditional wooden raft trip through the stunning Dunajec river gorge in Pieniny National Park. The 11km journey takes about 1 hour 45 minutes on traditional wooden rafts steered by raftsmen in folk costumes. The gorge features dramatic limestone cliffs up to 300m high on the Slovak-Polish border. A unique cultural and natural experience.
descriptionHebrew: קניון מרהיב עם מסלולי הליכה, סולמות וגשרים.
notes: Advance booking recommended in summer. Season: May-October. Contact: 0905 294 699. Students/seniors 23 EUR. Not suitable for babies in strollers. Trip ends at Slovak-Polish border near Lesnica. About 90 min drive from Malatíny.
notesHebrew: פעילות מים מרגשת.
tags: שייט רפטים על נהר דונייץ (צד סלובקי)

name: Funpark Ziarce (Liptovsky Mikulas)
description: Adventure fun park near Liptovsky Mikulas featuring a variety of activities including rope courses, trampolines, and climbing elements. Popular family destination in the Liptov region combining adventure with fun for all ages.
descriptionHebrew: פארק חבלים בגובה עם מסלולי טיפוס מאתגרים. באזור ליפטוב.
notes: Outdoor activity - weather dependent. Various activities suitable for different ages. In Liptov area near other attractions. Check opening status for 2026 summer season.
notesHebrew: פעילות הרפתקנית ומרגשת. באזור ליפטוב.

name: Jánošíkove Diery (Jánošík's Gorges)
description: A spectacular series of gorges and waterfalls near Terchová in Malá Fatra National Park. Three connected gorges with ladders, chains, wooden bridges and walkways through narrow rock passages with waterfalls. Named after Slovak folk hero Juraj Jánošík. One of the most beautiful hiking trails in Slovakia combining adventure with nature.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול טיול בטבע. בהרי מאלה פאטרה.
address: Terchová, Malá Fatra National Park, Žilina Region, Slovakia
notes: Three gorges - lower gorge easiest (suitable for fit children 8+), upper gorges more challenging with ladders and chains. Allow 2-4 hours round trip. Wear sturdy shoes - trails can be wet and slippery. NOT suitable for babies/strollers. Closed in winter and after heavy rain. Best June-September. Near Vrátna valley.
notesHebrew: קניון מרהיב עם מסלולי הליכה, סולמות וגשרים. כולל מעבר בסולמות ושרשראות.

name: Kvačianska and Prosiecka Valley Circuit
description: A stunning nature trail combining two narrow limestone gorges (valleys) in the Chočské Vrchy mountains between Orava and Liptov. Features dramatic rock walls, waterfalls, old watermills, wooden bridges, and chains/ladders in narrow sections. Prosiecka Valley is narrower and more adventurous; Kvačianska is wider with historic watermills. Can be done as a loop.
descriptionHebrew: מפל מים מרשים בלב הטבע. הגישה דרך שביל טיול. באזור ליפטוב.
address: Kvačany / Prosiek villages, between Dolný Kubín and Ružomberok, Slovakia
notes: Loop trail approximately 4-5 hours. Prosiecka valley has chains and ladders - not for small children or those afraid of heights. Kvačianska valley is easier with watermills. Wear good hiking boots. NOT suitable for babies/strollers. Closed in winter. Park at Kvačany village. One of Slovakia's most beautiful nature hikes.
notesHebrew: מסלול טיול בטבע.

name: Kvačianska dolina (Kvačany Valley Gorge)
description: A scenic limestone gorge between the villages of Kvačany and Oblazy, featuring a historic water mill (Oblazy mill), small waterfalls, and a narrow canyon with towering rock walls. The trail follows a stream through a dramatic narrow passage. One of the best-kept secrets of the Liptov region.
descriptionHebrew: מפל מים מרשים בלב הטבע. הגישה דרך שביל טיול. באזור ליפטוב.
address: Kvačany - Oblazy, Liptovský Mikuláš District, Žilina Region, Slovakia
notes: Difficulty: EASY-MEDIUM. The trail through the gorge is approximately 5 km one way. Parts are flat and easy, but the narrow gorge section involves some scrambling over rocks. Baby carrier feasible for the first/easier sections. The historic Oblazy watermill is a highlight. Allow 2-3 hours round trip. Free parking at Kvačany village.
notesHebrew: קניון מרהיב עם מסלולי הליכה, סולמות וגשרים. מים זורמים לאורך המסלול. אורך המסלול: 5 ק"מ.

name: Liptov Cycling Trails Network
description: An extensive network of over 900 km of marked cycling routes across the Liptov region between the Low and High Tatras. Routes range from easy family paths along rivers to challenging mountain biking trails. Features 30+ e-bike charging stations, bicycle bus service, and routes around Liptovská Mara reservoir. Well-signposted with mobile app available.
descriptionHebrew: רכיבה על אופניים חשמליים. במסלולים מסומנים. באזור ליפטוב. אורך המסלול: 900 ק"מ.
address: Liptov Region, central Slovakia (hub: Liptovský Mikuláš)
notes: 900+ km of marked routes. Family routes available along Váh river and around Liptovská Mara. Downloadable cycling map. Mobile app for route planning. Bicycle bus service available. E-bike charging stations throughout. Malinô Brdo cable car accepts bikes. Routes for all levels from flat riverside to mountain trails.
notesHebrew: רכיבה על אופניים חשמליים. במסלולים מסומנים. באזור ליפטוב.
distanceFromMalatiny: 35-45 דקות נסיעה to Liptovský Mikuláš (כ-40-50 ק"מ)

name: Liptovská Mara Reservoir
description: A large 22 km2 reservoir on the Váh river near Liptovský Mikuláš, popular for summer recreation. Offers swimming beaches, windsurfing, sailing, and boat rentals. Beautiful mountain backdrop with views of both Low and High Tatras. Multiple beaches and recreation areas around the shore.
descriptionHebrew: שייט והפלגה. באזור ליפטוב. אורך המסלול: 22 ק"מ.
address: Liptovská Mara, Liptovský Mikuláš District, Žilina Region, Slovakia
priceAdult: Free (beach access ~2-5 EUR, boat rentals separate)
notes: Difficulty: EASY. Multiple beach areas around the reservoir. Water temperature in August can reach 20-22C. Various water sports available (paddleboarding, kayaking, windsurfing). Good option for a relaxed family day. Can combine with nearby attractions in Liptov region. Parking available at beaches.
notesHebrew: שייט בקיאקים. במים רגועים, מתאים למתחילים. באזור ליפטוב.

name: Lúčanský Waterfall
description: 12-meter high waterfall declared a national monument, uniquely located in the middle of Lúčky village. Water cascades over travertine terraces into small pools. One of only 5 waterfalls with national monument status in Slovakia.
descriptionHebrew: מפל מים מרשים בלב הטבע.
notes: Very easy access - located in the middle of the village. Paid parking at waterfall, free parking nearby. National monument since 1974. Quick stop - 15-30 minutes.
notesHebrew: מפל מים מרשים בלב הטבע.

name: Malinô Brdo Bike Park
description: Lift-accessed downhill mountain bike park near Ruzomberok with 12 trails ranging from easy to extreme difficulty. Fun & Skill Park for beginners. Part of Velka Fatra mountains.
descriptionHebrew: רכיבת אופניים במורד ההר. במסלולים מסומנים.
notes: Cable car access to trails. Bike rental available. Fun & Skill Park for skill development. Season passes available. Open daily in summer.
notesHebrew: רכיבת אופניים. במסלולים מסומנים.

name: Observation Tower Liptovský Ján
description: Sightseeing tower in the village of Liptovsky Jan offering views of the Western Tatras and Low Tatras mountains. Combined with mineral springs visit nearby.
descriptionHebrew: אתר טבע מרהיב. באזור ליפטוב.
notes: Easy access. Near mineral springs. Can combine with village walk. Good viewpoint of surrounding mountains.
notesHebrew: תצפית פנורמית עם נוף מרהיב.

name: Orava Dam Boat Cruise (Loď Orava)
description: Sightseeing cruise on the Orava Reservoir aboard the MP-ORAVA vessel (162 passenger capacity). The 1.5-hour cruise includes a stop at Slanický Island (Art Island) with views of the Western Tatras mountains. The reservoir is the largest in Slovakia and offers stunning mountain panoramas. Onboard buffet and refreshments available.
descriptionHebrew: שייט והפלגה. באזור אוראבה.
address: Port #1, near Hotel Prístav, Námestovo, Orava Dam, Slovakia
notes: Season: May 1 - October. Departures: 9:30, 11:00, 13:00, 15:00, 16:30. Minimum 15 adults required for departure. Strollers 1 EUR. Students/seniors/disabled 8 EUR. Booking: objednavka.lodorava.sk or +421 915 135 537. Slanický Island art visit included. Very baby-friendly with toilets on board.
notesHebrew: פעילות מים מרגשת. באזור אוראבה.

name: Prosiecka dolina (Prosiek Valley Gorge)
description: A dramatic narrow limestone gorge near the village of Prosiek in the Chočské vrchy mountains. Features extremely narrow passages between towering rock walls (some sections only 2-3 meters wide), with metal ladders and chains in the steeper parts. Connected to Kvačianska dolina for a longer traverse.
descriptionHebrew: קניון מרהיב עם מסלולי הליכה, סולמות וגשרים. כולל מעבר בסולמות ושרשראות.
address: Prosiek, Liptovský Mikuláš District, Žilina Region, Slovakia
notes: Difficulty: MEDIUM-HARD. Involves metal ladders and chains in narrow passages. NOT suitable for baby or stroller. The 10-year-old should only attempt if experienced with scrambling/climbing. Very narrow sections - can be intimidating. Trail can be slippery when wet. Best combined with Kvačianska dolina for a full day adventure. Allow 3-4 hours for the traverse.
notesHebrew: אתר טבע מרהיב.

name: Roháče Mountains - Hiking & Waterfalls
description: The Roháče mountains are the western extension of the Tatras, easily accessible from Orava. Features beautiful alpine lakes (Roháčske plesá), dramatic waterfalls (Roháčsky waterfall - 17m), and a chairlift from Spálená to access higher trails. Less crowded than the High Tatras but equally beautiful. The Roháčsky waterfall is one of the most accessible in the area.
descriptionHebrew: אגם הרים קרחוני עם מים צלולים ונוף הררי מרהיב. באזור אוראבה.
address: Roháče, Zuberec / Oravice area, Western Tatras, Slovakia
notes: Multiple trail options from easy (waterfall - 30min from parking) to challenging (alpine lakes - 3-4h). Chairlift at Spálená operates in summer for easier access to higher trails. Roháčsky waterfall accessible in ~30 min easy walk. Alpine lakes require longer hike. NOT stroller-friendly on mountain trails. Parking at Zuberec/Oravice.
notesHebrew: מסלול הליכה קל ומשפחתי.
distanceFromMalatiny: 25 דקות נסיעה (כ-20 ק"מ to Zuberec trailhead)

name: Slovak Paradise - Zejmarska Roklina Canyon
description: The smallest and most accessible canyon in Slovak Paradise near Lake Dedinky. Well-maintained with ladders, bridges and chains. Good for families with older children.
descriptionHebrew: אגם יפהפה עם אפשרויות פנאי. בגן העדן הסלובקי.
notes: Easy-moderate difficulty. 45 minutes through canyon plus return. Well-maintained. Includes wet sections - waterproof shoes needed.
notesHebrew: קניון מרהיב עם מסלולי הליכה, סולמות וגשרים. מים זורמים לאורך המסלול.

name: Slovenský Raj - Piecky Gorge
description: Another dramatic gorge trail in Slovak Paradise National Park featuring waterfalls, ladders, and chains. Piecky is considered more challenging than Suchá Belá with more technical climbing sections. The trail ascends along a stream through increasingly narrow canyon walls with several impressive waterfalls.
descriptionHebrew: מפל מים מרשים בלב הטבע. הגישה דרך שביל טיול. בגן העדן הסלובקי.
address: Slovenský raj National Park, near Podlesok, 053 15, Slovakia
notes: More challenging than Suchá Belá - requires better fitness and confidence on ladders. One-way uphill only. Duration: 2-3 hours. NOT suitable for children under 12 or baby. Waterproof shoes essential. Open June 15 - October 31. Go early to avoid queues at ladder sections.
notesHebrew: פעילות מים מרגשת.

name: Slovenský Raj - Suchá Belá Gorge (Gorge Walking with Waterfalls)
nameHebrew: גן עדן הסלובקי - ערוץ סוכה בלה
description: Spectacular gorge hike through Suchá Belá in Slovak Paradise National Park. The trail follows a stream through a narrow canyon with numerous waterfalls, metal ladders, chains, wooden bridges, and walkways bolted into rock walls. You wade through water in places. One of the most famous and popular gorge trails in Slovakia - a unique adventure combining hiking with water and vertical elements.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול טיול בטבע. בגן העדן הסלובקי.
address: Slovenský raj National Park, Hrabušice area, 053 15, Slovakia
notes: One-way uphill only (against stream flow). Duration: 2-3 hours. Difficulty: moderate - requires climbing ladders, crossing walkways, getting feet wet. Waterproof shoes essential. NOT suitable for baby in carrier due to ladders and exposure. Gorges open approx. June 15 - October 31. Can be crowded in summer - go early. Mountain Rescue: +421 53 4297902.
notesHebrew: קניון מרהיב עם מסלולי הליכה, סולמות וגשרים. כולל מעבר בסולמות ושרשראות. מים זורמים לאורך המסלול.
tags: גן עדן הסלובקי - ערוץ סוכה בלה

name: Slovenský raj - Prielom Hornádu (Hornád River Breakthrough)
nameHebrew: גן עדן הסלובקי - פריצת נהר הורנאד
description: The most family-friendly trail in Slovak Paradise National Park. Unlike the famous gorge trails with ladders, this riverside trail follows the Hornád river through a beautiful canyon on a flat path. Suitable for families who want to experience the park without climbing ladders.
descriptionHebrew: קניון מרהיב עם מסלולי הליכה, סולמות וגשרים. כולל מעבר בסולמות ושרשראות. בגן העדן הסלובקי. מתאים למשפחות.
address: Slovenský raj, Hrabušice/Čingov entrance, Spišská Nová Ves District, Slovakia
notes: Difficulty: EASY. Flat riverside path, no ladders required. This is the best option for families with small children in Slovak Paradise. Other gorge trails (Suchá Belá, Piecky) require climbing metal ladders and are one-way only - NOT suitable for babies/strollers. The Hornád trail can be done as a return trip. Allow 2-3 hours.
notesHebrew: קניון מרהיב עם מסלולי הליכה, סולמות וגשרים. כולל מעבר בסולמות ושרשראות. בגן העדן הסלובקי.
tags: גן עדן הסלובקי - פריצת נהר הורנאד

name: Slovenský raj - Suchá Belá Gorge
nameHebrew: גן עדן הסלובקי - ערוץ סוחה בלה
description: The most famous gorge trail in Slovak Paradise, featuring metal ladders, chains, and bridges through a narrow canyon with waterfalls. An unforgettable adventure trail climbing through cascading water. One-way trail only (you go up through the gorge). Extremely scenic but physically demanding.
descriptionHebrew: מפל מים מרשים בלב הטבע. הגישה דרך שביל טיול. בגן העדן הסלובקי.
address: Suchá Belá, Slovenský raj, near Hrabušice, Slovakia
notes: Difficulty: MEDIUM-HARD. Features metal ladders, chains, and bridges. One-way only (ascent). Takes 2-3 hours for the gorge section. NOT suitable for babies, strollers, or the 10-year-old unless very fit and experienced. You will get wet from waterfall spray. Wear sturdy shoes with grip. Open seasonally (typically June-October). Can be very crowded - start early.
notesHebrew: מפל מים מרשים בלב הטבע.
tags: גן עדן הסלובקי - ערוץ סוחה בלה

name: Stratena Valley (Slovak Paradise)
description: A romantic 14km valley along the Hnilec River on a former vehicle road. Completely flat gravel pathway with educational signs, accessible for strollers and wheelchairs.
descriptionHebrew: אתר טבע מרהיב.
notes: Easy/accessible. 14 km gravel pathway. Stroller and wheelchair friendly. Educational signs about caves and nature along the route.
notesHebrew: מערה מרשימה פתוחה למבקרים עם סיור מודרך. אורך המסלול: 14 ק"מ.

name: Swing over Liptovská Mara
description: One of the most famous scenic swings in Liptov, located overlooking the Liptovska Mara reservoir with panoramic views of the water and surrounding mountains. Free and family-friendly.
descriptionHebrew: תצפית פנורמית עם נוף מרהיב. באזור ליפטוב. מתאים למשפחות.
notes: Free access. Beautiful photo opportunity. One of several scenic swings throughout the region. Best at golden hour for photos.
notesHebrew: אתר טבע מרהיב.

name: Tiesňavy Gorge (Malá Fatra entrance gorge)
description: A dramatic narrow gorge at the entrance to Vrátna dolina valley in Malá Fatra. Towering limestone rock walls on both sides of the road create a natural gateway to the valley. Can be experienced by car or on foot. Short walking trails along the gorge offer stunning views of the rock formations.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול הליכה עם נופים פנורמיים מרהיבים. בהרי מאלה פאטרה.
address: Tiesňavy, road to Vrátna dolina, near Terchová, Žilina Region, Slovakia
notes: Difficulty: EASY. Can be viewed from the car while driving into Vrátna dolina. Short walking paths available along the gorge. Fully accessible for all ages. Great photo opportunity. Combine with cable car ride to Chleb. Free to visit.
notesHebrew: קניון מרהיב עם מסלולי הליכה, סולמות וגשרים.

name: Veľký Rozsutec (hiking viewpoint)
description: An iconic 1,610m peak in Malá Fatra with distinctive rocky summit and spectacular views. The standard route from Štefanová (625m) takes about 2.5 hours via green-blazed trail through Medziholie pass. One of the most photographed mountains in Slovakia with dramatic karst rock formations.
descriptionHebrew: אתר טבע מרהיב. בהרי מאלה פאטרה.
notes: Difficulty: MEDIUM-HARD. 2.5 hours ascent, ~1000m elevation gain. NOT suitable for baby or 10-year-old due to steep rocky sections near the summit. Protected Rozsutec National Nature Reserve with endemic species. Wear sturdy boots. Start early. The trail via Medziholie is described as the 'easiest route' but still demanding.
notesHebrew: אתר טבע מרהיב.
distanceFromMalatiny: ~45 ק"מ, כ-45 דקות נסיעה to Štefanová trailhead

name: Vratna Cable Car to Chleb Peak
description: 8-seater cable car ascending to Snilovsky saddle (1,492m) in the Mala Fatra National Park, providing access to spectacular ridge hiking trails including Chleb peak. One of the most scenic cable car rides in Slovakia with views of the Mala Fatra mountain range. Starting point for numerous hiking trails.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול הליכה עם נופים פנורמיים מרהיבים. בהרי מאלה פאטרה.
notes: Operating daily 8:30-18:00 in summer. Ridge hiking from top station - moderate to difficult trails. Not stroller-friendly above cable car station. Beautiful panoramic views. Can combine with Paseky adventure activities. Near Terchova (birthplace of legendary Janosik).
notesHebrew: מסלול הליכה עם נופים פנורמיים מרהיבים.

name: Vrátna dolina & Cable Car to Chleb
description: One of the most visited tourist valleys in Slovakia, set in the Malá Fatra National Park. Features a modern 8-seat gondola cable car from 740m to Chleb peak at 1,490m. The valley includes the dramatic Tiesňavy gorge with towering rock walls. Beautiful alpine meadows and panoramic views from the ridge.
descriptionHebrew: קניון מרהיב עם מסלולי הליכה, סולמות וגשרים. בהרי מאלה פאטרה.
address: Vrátna dolina, 013 06 Terchová, Žilina Region, Slovakia
notes: Difficulty: EASY (cable car) to MEDIUM (ridge walks). The cable car makes the alpine scenery accessible to all ages. Short walks on the ridge from the top station. The Tiesňavy gorge at the valley entrance is driveable/walkable and very scenic. Multiple difficulty levels available. Very popular - arrive early.
notesHebrew: קניון מרהיב עם מסלולי הליכה, סולמות וגשרים.

name: Váh River Cycling Path
description: Easy riverside cycling path along the Váh river near Liptovský Mikuláš. Flat terrain following the river through scenic Liptov countryside.
descriptionHebrew: רכיבת אופניים. באזור ליפטוב.
notes: Easy flat path along river. Suitable for families with young children. E-bike charging stations along route.
notesHebrew: רכיבה על אופניים חשמליים. במסלולים מסומנים.
distanceFromMalatiny: ~25 ק"מ, כ-25 דקות נסיעה to start

name: Šútovo Waterfall (Šútovský vodopád)
description: The tallest waterfall in Malá Fatra National Park at 38 meters, and one of the tallest in Slovakia. A beautiful forest hike leads to the impressive cascade falling over a rock cliff. The trail goes through scenic forest along a stream. A rewarding family hike with a spectacular payoff.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול הליכה קל ומשפחתי. בהרי מאלה פאטרה.
address: Šútovo, near Kraľovany, Malá Fatra, Slovakia
notes: Easy-moderate hike, approximately 45-60 min one way from parking. Well-marked trail through forest. The last section is steeper. NOT stroller-friendly. Wear sturdy shoes. Best after rain when waterfall is most impressive. Free parking at trailhead near Šútovo village. Can be combined with Kraľovany area activities.
notesHebrew: מסלול הליכה קל ומשפחתי.

name: Šútovský vodopád (Šútovo Waterfall)
description: The tallest waterfall in the Malá Fatra region at 38 meters (125 ft), a dramatic single-drop plunge waterfall. Located in a beautiful forested gorge fed by the Šútovský stream. The trail through the forest to the waterfall is scenic and relatively accessible.
descriptionHebrew: מפל מים מרשים בלב הטבע. אחד המפלים הגבוהים באזור. הגישה דרך שביל טיול. בהרי מאלה פאטרה.
address: Šútovo, Žilina Region, Slovakia (approx 4 km north of Šútovo village)
notes: Difficulty: EASY-MEDIUM. Trail from Šútovo village is approximately 4 km one way through forest, relatively gentle gradient. Baby carrier friendly for most of the path. The last section near the waterfall may have some uneven terrain. Allow 1-1.5 hours each way. No booking needed. Free access.
notesHebrew: מפל מים מרשים בלב הטבע. הגישה דרך שביל טיול. אורך המסלול: 4 ק"מ.
distanceFromMalatiny: ~25 ק"מ, כ-30 דקות נסיעה to trailhead

name: Chabad Vienna (Chabad Haus Wien)
description: Major Chabad house serving Vienna's Jewish community and tourists. Located in the 2nd district (Leopoldstadt). Offers daily prayers, Shabbat services with full schedule: Chassidic Discourse 9:30 AM, Morning Prayers 10:00 AM, Children's Service (Kinder Minyan) 11:00 AM, Kiddush and Shabbat Meal 12:30 PM. Provides mikveh, eruv information, tourist guidance, and WhatsApp group for travelers. Walking distance to multiple hotels and kosher restaurants.
descriptionHebrew: בית חב"ד - שירותי יהדות, תפילות, ארוחות שבת וכשרות. ארוחות שבת בהזמנה מראש. בוינה.
notes: Phone: +43-67683181771, +43-1235111810. Email: office@chabadvienna.com. WhatsApp: +43-67683181771. EXCELLENT choice for Shabbat Aug 8-9 - has children's service, full Shabbat meals, eruv in Vienna for pushing stroller. Register in advance for Shabbat meals. Mikveh available on premises. Vienna has eruv. Vayalen Boutique Hotel (kosher, 5 min walk) is nearby. Multiple hotels within 2-8 min walking distance. Very tourist-friendly with Hebrew, English, German support.
notesHebrew: בית חב"ד - שירותי יהדות, תפילות, ארוחות שבת וכשרות. ארוחות שבת בהזמנה מראש. בוינה.

name: Donauinsel (Danube Island) Activities
description: A 21 km long island in the Danube offering extensive free outdoor recreation. Features 135 km of paths for cycling and walking, swimming areas along the Neue Donau, pedal boat and rowing boat rentals, e-boat rentals, beach volleyball, basketball courts, street workout stations, water play areas for children, and grilling areas. Completely flat terrain ideal for family cycling.
descriptionHebrew: רכיבת אופניים. אורך המסלול: 21 ק"מ.
notes: 21 km of flat asphalt cycling path. Pedal boats, rowing boats, and e-boats available for rent. Multiple swimming beaches (free). No admission fee. Accessible by U-Bahn (U1 Donauinsel station). Baby-friendly: flat, paved paths throughout. Bring own bikes or rent nearby.
notesHebrew: רכיבת אופניים. אורך המסלול: 21 ק"מ.

name: EuroVelo 6 Danube Cycle Path - Vienna to Bratislava
description: Section of the famous EuroVelo 6 Rivers Route connecting Vienna and Bratislava along the Danube. Mostly flat, well-paved dedicated cycling path passing through Donau-Auen National Park with beautiful riverside scenery. One of the most popular cycling routes in Europe. Distance approximately 65 km one way.
descriptionHebrew: רכיבת אופניים. במסלולים מסומנים. בוינה. אורך המסלול: 65 ק"מ.
address: Start: Schwedenplatz/Danube Canal, Vienna; End: Bratislava city center (or reverse)
priceAdult: Free (path usage); Bike rental from EUR 20-25/day
priceChild: Free (path usage); Children's bike rental from EUR 12-21/day
notes: Easy to medium difficulty. Flat terrain. Well-signposted throughout Austria. Train stations every 5 km along route for flexibility. Can combine with Twin City Liner boat for one-way trip. Family-friendly but 65 km is long - consider doing partial sections. Donau-Auen National Park section is scenic highlight.
notesHebrew: שייט והפלגה. אורך המסלול: 5 ק"מ. מתאים למשפחות.
distanceFromMalatiny: Vienna start is 280 ק"מ from Malatiny; Bratislava end is 225 ק"מ

name: Familypark St. Margarethen
description: Large outdoor family adventure park located between Vienna and Bratislava in Burgenland, Austria. Features themed adventure areas including Adventure Island, Farm area, and Fairy Tale Forest. Outdoor rides and activities suitable for families with children of all ages. Over 30 attractions included in admission.
descriptionHebrew: אטרקציה משפחתית. בוינה.
address: Marchenparkweg 1, 7062 St. Margarethen im Burgenland, Austria
priceChild: Free under 3; Ages 3+: EUR 37-44; Seniors (60+, Mon-Fri) EUR 30-34
notes: Hours July: 10:00-19:00 (admission until 18:00). Online tickets cheaper than gate. Some activities require token coins (EUR 1 each). Birthday children (3-14) enter free on birthday. Located midway between Vienna and Bratislava. Large park - allow full day. Annual pass EUR 96-99.
notesHebrew: אטרקציה משפחתית. בוינה.

name: Kahlenberg and Leopoldsberg Hiking
description: Vienna's most popular hilltop viewpoints in the 19th district. Kahlenberg (484m) and neighboring Leopoldsberg (425m) offer spectacular panoramic views over Vienna, the Danube, and on clear days to the Carpathians. Connected by well-marked hiking trails through vineyards and forest. Accessible by bus from city center.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול הליכה עם נופים פנורמיים מרהיבים. בוינה.
notes: Free hiking. Bus 38A from Heiligenstadt (U4) goes to summit. Walking trails from Nussdorf through vineyards (approx 1.5 hours up). Restaurant and cafe at Kahlenberg summit. Leopoldsberg has a church and viewpoint. Steep trails - not stroller-friendly for most routes (bus access to top is stroller-ok). Combine with wine tavern (Heuriger) visit.
notesHebrew: מסלול הליכה עם נופים פנורמיים מרהיבים.

name: Kletterpark Purkersdorf
description: Forest rope climbing park just 20 minutes west of Vienna in the Wienerwald. High-rope courses through the treetops with a jungle atmosphere. Features multiple difficulty levels suitable for ages 3 and up. Includes team training activities and adventure courses with zip lines and obstacles.
descriptionHebrew: פארק חבלים בגובה עם מסלולי טיפוס מאתגרים. כולל זיפליין. בוינה.
notes: July-August open daily 10:00-19:00. Family ticket: EUR 45 (2 adults + 2 kids, 10% discount). School groups get EUR 3 discount. Pizza available on-site. Booking recommended for groups. Not suitable for baby in carrier on course but grounds accessible.
notesHebrew: פעילות הרפתקנית ומרגשת.

name: Lainzer Tiergarten
description: A 2,450-hectare nature reserve at Vienna's western edge - one of the last remnants of primordial Wienerwald. Features 1,945 hectares of forest, wild boar and deer roaming freely, extensive walking trails within a 22 km perimeter wall. Completely free entry. A genuine wilderness experience within city limits.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול טיול בטבע. בוינה. אורך המסלול: 22 ק"מ.
notes: Open daily 8:00-21:00 (summer hours). Free admission. Multiple entrance gates (Lainzer Tor, St. Veiter Tor, etc.). Main paths suitable for strollers. Wild animals (deer, boar) visible. Hermesvilla inside the park. Bring water and snacks - limited facilities inside. Accessible by public transport.
notesHebrew: אתר טבע מרהיב.

name: Lobau - Danube Wetlands National Park
description: Part of the Donau-Auen National Park, the Lobau is a pristine Danube wetland area in Vienna's 22nd district. Features flat cycling and walking trails through floodplain forests, oxbow lakes, and meadows. Swimming spots in natural ponds (Dechantlacke). Excellent bird watching and wildlife observation. A unique urban wilderness.
descriptionHebrew: רכיבת אופניים. במסלולים מסומנים. בוינה.
notes: Free entry. Flat terrain - excellent for strollers and cycling. Natural swimming at Dechantlacke (free, no facilities). Cycling paths connect to Donauinsel. Bring water and mosquito repellent in summer. No food facilities inside - bring picnic. Nationalparkhaus has info center. Best accessed from Lobgrundstrasse entrance.
notesHebrew: רכיבת אופניים.

name: Myrafälle Waterfall Park
description: Family-friendly waterfall hiking trail in Muggendorf, Lower Austria. Features stunning natural waterfalls designated as a natural monument, 11 themed educational stations along wooden walkways and bridges, a water playground, climbing area for children, and raft adventure at Myrateich pond. Beautiful gorge with multiple cascading waterfalls.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול הליכה קל ומשפחתי. מתאים למשפחות.
notes: Open daily 8:00 until dusk. Group rates available (25+ people): EUR 6/adult, EUR 2/child. Water playground and raft adventure for kids. Wooden walkways and bridges - may be challenging with stroller on parts of the trail. About 1 hour south of Vienna. Brochures in English available.
notesHebrew: מסלול טיול בטבע. בוינה.

name: Rax-Seilbahn (Rax Cable Car)
description: Austria's first passenger cable car (celebrating 100 years in 2026), ascending to 1,600m on the Raxalpe plateau in just 8 minutes. At the summit: diverse hiking trails, climbing tours, alpine garden, mountain huts with food. A quick journey from valley to alpine plateau with stunning panoramic views. Family-friendly with accessible facilities.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול הליכה עם נופים פנורמיים מרהיבים. מתאים למשפחות.
address: Rax-Seilbahn, 2651 Reichenau an der Rax, Austria
notes: Cable car ride: 8 minutes to 1,600m. Family discount: with 1 paying parent, children EUR 17-19 each. ÖAMTC/Alpine club members get discounts. Afternoon ticket from 3 PM: EUR 30.50. Multiple mountain huts for dining. Hiking trails various difficulty levels. About 1.5 hours south of Vienna. 100-year anniversary in 2026 - special events likely. Not ideal for strollers on summit trails.
notesHebrew: מסלול הליכה קל ומשפחתי. בוינה.

name: Schneebergbahn (Salamander Mountain Railway)
description: Historic cog railway operating since 1897, climbing to 1,800m on Lower Austria's highest peak. The modern Salamander train takes 40 minutes to reach Hochschneeberg station. At the summit: panoramic hiking trails, mountain restaurants, spectacular views. Nostalgic steam train runs on summer weekends. A unique mountain experience accessible from Vienna.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול הליכה עם נופים פנורמיים מרהיבים. בוינה.
priceAdult: ~EUR 40-44 round trip (estimate based on similar services)
notes: Train journey 40 min each way. Book tickets online in advance to secure seats. Steam train on summer Sundays/holidays. Summit at 1,800m - bring warm layers. Panorama hiking trails at top. About 1.5 hours south of Vienna by car. Station facilities are fully accessible. Puchberg starting station has modern tourism portal.
notesHebrew: מסלול הליכה עם נופים פנורמיים מרהיבים. בוינה.

name: Twin City Liner - Vienna to Bratislava by Boat
nameHebrew: טווין סיטי ליינר - ספינה בין וינה לברטיסלבה
description: High-speed catamaran passenger boat service connecting Vienna and Bratislava via the Danube River. The journey takes approximately 75 minutes and offers scenic views of the Danube landscape, Hainburg cliffs, and riverside nature between the two capitals.
descriptionHebrew: שייט והפלגה. על נהר הדנובה. בוינה.
address: Departure Vienna: Schwedenplatz, 1010 Wien, Austria; Arrival Bratislava: Razusovo nabrezie
priceAdult: Approx EUR 35-45 one way (check ticket.twincityliner.com for 2026 prices)
notes: Book online at ticket.twincityliner.com or call +43 1 904 88 80. Slovak bookings via FLORA TOUR +421 903 505 505. Captain's Lounge and catering on board. Disability access available. Travel documents required for border crossing. Duration approx 75 min.
notesHebrew: פעילות מים מרגשת.
distanceFromMalatiny: Vienna departure is 280 ק"מ from Malatiny, כ-3 שעות נסיעה
tags: טווין סיטי ליינר - ספינה בין וינה לברטיסלבה

name: Vayalen Boutique Hotel Vienna (Kosher Hotel)
description: Vienna's only kosher hotel, located 5 minutes walk from Chabad house. Ideal for Shabbat-observant families who need to walk to synagogue and meals.
descriptionHebrew: בית חב"ד - שירותי יהדות, תפילות, ארוחות שבת וכשרות. ארוחות שבת בהזמנה מראש. בוינה.
notes: Kosher-certified hotel. 5 minutes walk to Chabad Vienna. Book well in advance for Shabbat stays. Ideal for the family with a baby since eruv exists and hotel is close to shul. Check if they have Shabbat keys/programs.
notesHebrew: בית חב"ד - שירותי יהדות, תפילות, ארוחות שבת וכשרות. ארוחות שבת בהזמנה מראש. בוינה.

name: Vienna Woods Family Hiking Trails
description: 1,300 square kilometers of UNESCO Biosphere Reserve forest offering family-friendly hiking trails near Vienna. Features include the Peilstein Adventure Trail (designed for families), Kahlenberg to Sophienalpe trail, and circular hikes with playgrounds. The largest contiguous deciduous forest in Europe.
descriptionHebrew: מסלול הליכה קל ומשפחתי. בוינה. מתאים למשפחות.
address: Various trailheads - Kahlenberg, Perchtoldsdorf, Purkersdorf areas
notes: Peilstein Adventure Trail - best for families with kids. Kahlenberg to Sophienalpe - suitable for families and children. Circular Hike Around Exelberg has playgrounds along the way. Some trails NOT stroller-friendly (e.g., Jubilaumswarte route). Check trail descriptions before going with baby stroller. Well-marked paths.
notesHebrew: מסלול טיול בטבע.

name: Wienerwald Trail Center Wien (Mountain Biking)
nameHebrew: מרכז שבילי אופני הרים - יער וינה
description: Austria's first urban mountain bike trail center in the Vienna Woods. Features trails for beginners through advanced riders, bike rental services, and a trail school for skill development. Part of a 1,370 km network of mountain biking trails in the Vienna Woods region.
descriptionHebrew: רכיבת אופני הרים. במסלולים מסומנים. בוינה. אורך המסלול: 370 ק"מ.
notes: Multiple difficulty levels available. Easy trails like Allander MTB Runde (9.6 km, 1 hour) and Anninger Trail Easy (1.8 km) suitable for beginners. Trails free of charge - 98% financed by municipalities. Trail school available for learning. Refreshment stops along network.
notesHebrew: מסלול רכיבת אופניים. אורך המסלול: 9.6 ק"מ.
tags: מרכז שבילי אופני הרים - יער וינה

name: Divoka Voda (Wild Water) Cunovo
description: Premier water sports complex near Bratislava with 15 different activities. Features an artificial white-water channel that hosted the 2011 Water Slalom World Championships. Offers rafting, kayaking, canoeing, surfing on artificial wave, hydrospeed, jet skiing, Danube cruises, paintball, archery, and beach volleyball.
descriptionHebrew: רפטינג. בברטיסלבה.
priceAdult: Rafting EUR 27-65/person (90 min); Kayak EUR 8/hour; Surf wave EUR 15-20/half-full day; Jet Ski EUR 50-140
notes: Rafting for groups of 4-6 people with instructor. Booking recommended via phone or email areal@divokavoda.sk. On-site hotel, bungalows, restaurant, and camping available. Some activities weather-dependent.
notesHebrew: רפטינג. עם מדריך מקצועי.

name: Vodácke Centrum - Danube Kayaking (Hainburg to Bratislava)
nameHebrew: מרכז חתירה - שייט קיאק בדנובה מהיינבורג לברטיסלבה
description: Guided canoe/kayak trip on the Danube River from Hainburg (Austria) to Bratislava through the Donau-Auen National Park. Described as the most popular paddling experience near Bratislava, suitable even for complete beginners. Paddle through beautiful river landscapes with professional guides. The 20-year-old company emphasizes safety with professional instructors on every trip.
descriptionHebrew: שייט בקיאקים. בברטיסלבה.
notes: Season: spring to late autumn. 'Even small children can do it with us' per their website. 20 years experience. Phone: +421 915 438 156 or +421 902 687 586. Email: info@vodackecentrum.sk. Professional instructors accompany each group. Also offer sunset paddling and other routes.
notesHebrew: פעילות מים מרגשת.
distanceFromMalatiny: 310 ק"מ, כ-3 שעות נסיעה (near Bratislava - suitable for second part of trip)
tags: מרכז חתירה - שייט קיאק בדנובה מהיינבורג לברטיסלבה

name: Carmel Kosher Restaurant Budapest
description: Well-known kosher restaurant in Budapest's Jewish Quarter. Serves traditional Hungarian-Jewish cuisine and Middle Eastern dishes. One of the most established kosher dining options in Budapest.
descriptionHebrew: שירותי כשרות. בבודפשט.
notes: Meat restaurant under Orthodox kosher supervision. Located in the Jewish Quarter near the Kazinczy Street Synagogue. Popular with tourists and locals. Book in advance on weekends.
notesHebrew: בית כנסת.

name: Chabad Budapest - Ohel Naftali
description: Main Chabad house in Budapest serving the large local Jewish community and many tourists. Offers Shabbat services, Shabbat meals, daily minyanim, Torah classes, and community events.
